label: Wheeltop EDS
description: Connect to Wheeltop EDS wireless electronic groupsets via BLE. Display gear information, battery levels, shift counts, and drivetrain visuals on your Karoo. Toggle Race Mode from the ride screen.
releaseNotes:
* Fix BLE auto-reconnect after long idle periods
* Device no longer needs to be re-added after losing connection
* Automatic background reconnection when device comes back in range
